channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter everywhere, 7th July
item.description:
Litter strewn all down the street, been there for two days. Most of it is previously tagged flytipping that has been left and ripped apart by foxes. Addresses of the culprits visible on letters.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cudham Street, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This caravan was already reported. In support of the previous complaint I would like to point out that the caravan was previously parked outside 12, park avenue. The council has issued and enforcement notice but thd problem vehicle wss simply moved down the road so did not meet the request. Please remove this csravsn from the street., 7th July
item.description:
Caravan is permanently parked on the street and used for overnight accommodation. Please could the council remove it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2-50 even Wivenhoe Close, 7th July
item.description:
We found the house hold things mattresses and chaires in rear area. Please clean and fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Heaton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging brambles, 7th July
item.description:
Brambles and vegetation hanging through the fence and cutting off the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184, Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Fridge Full Rotten Stinking Fish, 7th July
item.description:
This needs to disposed of immediately, it's an abandoned fridge full of rotting fish. The stench is awful and it won't be long before it's full of maggots.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 7th July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on green
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead bird, 7th July
item.description:
Dead bird double bagged and left kerbside.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Dale Wood Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked, 7th July
item.description:
Drain totally full of stones and mud from burst main.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): School Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This time this week there has been fresh flytipping on this corner, 7th July
item.description:
This time it looks like a builder has dumped stuff. This is regular. Please instal cctv to catch the people who do this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 82 Willesden Lane, 7th July
item.description:
Please remove this from the pavement, it has been sitting here for more than 3 days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mickleham close right next to large tree opposite Hadley house, 7th July
item.description:
A large carpet roll, chest of drawers and a few large black full bin bags have been left
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-17, Mickleham Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near to 78 Boxgrove Road: large piece of black plastic., 7th July
item.description:
Fly-tip is behind the second concrete bollard near to 78 Boxgrove Road, opposite Boxgrove Road Primary School. Second report. First report marked as “Could not find.” Photo now attached, which should help.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boxgrove Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access slope built on pavement now trip hazard, 7th July
item.description:
The shop has had a new structure built on front they have put a slope on the pavement it’s now a trip hazard it’s the shop that sells curry bits a few shops down from the Rose Pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 223, Broadway, Bexley, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on Wrottesley Road opposite 59, 7th July
item.description:
Opposite number 59 on Wrottesley Road. Photos taken 7th July 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped on pavement outside 237 Burrage Road, 7th July
item.description:
237 Burrage Road continues to dump rubbish bags on the pavement. Photo taken 7th July 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You haven’t done anything. Rubbish is still there, 7th July
item.description:
Why marking the previous report as fixed when you haven’t actually done anything? Can you clean it properly?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street cleaning, 7th July
item.description:
The state of The Oval parade over the last few months is appalling. There is no evidence of any street cleaning. It is disgraceful that the council is not cleaning this well used area. Broken bottles, excess litter, leaves etc. It just requires regular street cleaning why is this not happening? I regularly see council vans parked up there but the only activity seems to be in the cafe!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, The Oval, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 7th July
item.description:
Car Red DV10MUO has been here in Northcote Road DA14 for 11 months untaxed and no MOT
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Stafford Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on the pedestrian crossing, 7th July
item.description:
At the end of the pedestrian crossing is a pothole there. I twisted my ancle there today and I fell on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, 7th July
item.description:
After spending huge amounts of time and money replacing all the paving stones on Reynolds Road to remove any trip hazards, both sides of the road are now covered in weeds and overgrown plants that are now much more dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reynolds Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
